props.name: heading
props.description: The heading text displayed at the top of the modal.

props.name: closable
props.description: Show close icon and allow clicking the background to close the modal.

props.name: open
props.description: Controls if modal is visible or not.

props.name: transition
props.description: Sets the animation transition when opening/closing. 'fast' or 'slow' for animated, 'none' for instant.

props.name: calloutVariant
props.description: Define the context and colour of the callout modal. It is required when type is set to callout.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Set the max allowed width of the modal.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.
